commands.summary: Confirmed RepoPact validation passed after adding the source viability review, host checker, and required-document validation.
Ran four ROM lab safety/profile tests successfully.

commands.command: Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { large/forbidden firmware artifact scan }
commands.summary: Confirmed no large binaries, firmware images, archives, vendor blobs, or ROM artifacts were present.
Read-only host check reported Windows 10 Pro, 276.59 GB free on C:, 31.54 GB RAM, 8 logical cores, WSL binary present without a usable distro, and no Docker.

commands.command: GitHub API, raw file, and git ls-remote inspections of def/sm6150/AOSP/Lineage/GSI candidates
commands.summary: Verified candidate branch, commit, content, license-status, and relevance metadata without cloning large source trees.
